scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:e2e && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.qa:dashboard: node etc/scripts/sgc.js qa snapshot coletar --perfil rapido
scripts.lint:ox: oxlint e2e etc/scripts eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts --ignore-pattern e2e/lifecycle.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ox && eslint e2e etc/scripts eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts --fix
scripts.deps:audit:all: npm run deps:audit && npm --prefix frontend run deps:audit && npm --prefix etc/scripts run deps:audit
scripts.sast: semgrep scan --config p/java --config p/typescript --config p/javascript --config p/owasp-top-ten --config p/security-audit --config p/secrets --metrics=off
